expect: SPACES GET CREATED — the supplied material is split across MULTIPLE specialist agents for distinct parts of the trip (the real places/legs it covers), grounded in the supplied content — NOT dumped into a single generic catch-all space. The exact partition is the model's call; what fails is one catch-all, or no specialists at all.
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["All done — your Tanzania trip dashboard is ready."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["I've pulled everything together from your five sources into one organised home. You can open it right now at ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["/app/tanzania-trip/"]}," — it'll work on your phone too."]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"success","title":"What's in there"},"children":[{"type":"List","props":{"items":["💰 Cost tracker — every row from your spreadsheet, actuals vs budget, spread across categories","🗓️ Day-by-day itinerary — flights, lodges, contacts, payment schedule, all 18 days","🏛️ Ngorongoro tariff schedule — every official fee confirmed, including that TSh 5,000 ranger gate tip","🛍️ Voice-memo extras — the Maasai bracelets for Athena Mari (TSh 35,000/~$25), Emmanuel the driver-guide","📷 Your Stone Town courtyard photo"]},"children":[]}]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["I've also set up three specialist trip assistants — one for the ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["safari leg"]},", one for ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Zanzibar"]},", and one for the ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["logistics"]}," — so when you're on the ground and need to ask \"what's the next lodge?\" or \"how much is the park entry?\" you'll get an instant answer from your own material, no digging required."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["One loose end from the voice memo: ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Emmanuel said to ask Richard about that TSh 5,000 ranger tip before the safari balance payment"]},". The tariff PDF confirms the amount, but it's worth confirming with Richard whether it's already included or separate. Want me to help you draft that message?"]}]}

[{"value":"Purpose & context\nVasilis is planning a fully booked international trip in August 2026, traveling with a companion named Athina Mari. The trip spans Cairo (Egypt), Arusha and the northern Tanzania safari circuit, Zanzibar, and Dar es Salaam, running August 3–20. The trip combines cultural sightseeing in Cairo, a group camping safari through Tarangire, Lake Manyara, and Ngorongoro Crate…

itinerary.description: Depart Athens (ATH) on Aegean A3932, 06:55–08:50. Arrive Cairo. Explore Grand Egyptian Museum and Pyramids of Giza.
itinerary.contacts: [{"name":"Eileen Hotel","phone":"+20 15 56434043","email":"info@eileenhotel.com","address":"21 Youssef El-Gendy St, Abdeen, Downtown Cairo"}]
itinerary.notes: Eileen Hotel near Tahrir Square/Nile Corniche

itinerary.description: Full day in Cairo. Late checkout from Eileen Hotel. Depart CAI on EgyptAir at 22:40.
Arrive DAR 04:20. Connect to Precision Air TC144, DAR→ARK, 10:50–12:00. Arrive Arusha, check into Serengeti Villa.
itinerary.notes: Precision Air luggage restrictions favor soft bags

itinerary.description: Rest and preparation day in Arusha. Safari briefing with Suricata Safaris.
itinerary.notes: Safari balance ($960) due on arrival — cash (post-2009 USD) or Pesapal (+5%)

itinerary.description: Safari Day 1: Depart Arusha for Tarangire National Park. Game drive. Overnight at Twiga Camp Site (FB).
itinerary.notes: Tarangire NP entrance: $59/person peak season. Suricata Safaris 3-day group camping.

itinerary.description: Safari Day 2: Lake Manyara National Park game drive. Overnight at Twiga Camp Site (FB).
itinerary.notes: Lake Manyara NP entrance: $59/person peak season

itinerary.description: Safari Day 3: Ngorongoro Crater descent with Emmanuel (driver-guide). Full-day crater game drive. Overnight at Jevas Hotel (HB).
itinerary.notes: Warm layers needed — crater rim is cold. Crater descent gates close 16:00. Emmanuel was the crater driver-guide.

itinerary.description: Return to Arusha. Rest and recovery. Check into Kutoka Lodge.
Fly Precision Air TC145, ARK→ZNZ, 12:40–13:40. Arrive Zanzibar. Check into Treasures of Zanzibar House in Stone Town.
itinerary.accommodation: Treasures of Zanzibar House, Stone Town

itinerary.description: Explore Stone Town: winding alleys, courtyards, arched windows, dark carved wooden balconies. Cultural and historical exploration.
itinerary.accommodation: Treasures of Zanzibar House, Stone Town

itinerary.description: Transfer to north coast. Check into Ayla Beach House in Kendwa area. Beach time begins.
itinerary.notes: North coast (Nungwi area) offers more consistent swimming conditions. Local Zanzibar driving permit ~$15.

itinerary.description: Beach day. Evening: The Rock Restaurant dinner, 18:00–20:00 sitting, 2 adults, outdoor seating for sunset views. 2x Tropical Passion Fruit Cheesecake included.
itinerary.notes: The Rock dinner fully paid ($46). Outdoor seating requested.

itinerary.description: Beach day. Relaxation and local exploration.
Ferry from Zanzibar to Dar es Salaam. Check into Sunny Shore B&B. City exploration.
itinerary.accommodation: Sunny Shore B&B, Dar es Salaam
itinerary.notes: Dar exploration: Kivukoni Fish Market, Kariakoo Market, National Museum, Coco Beach, Bongoyo Island

itinerary.description: Full day exploring Dar es Salaam.
itinerary.accommodation: Sunny Shore B&B, Dar es Salaam

itinerary.description: Fly DAR→CAI on EgyptAir, 05:20–11:05. Arrive Cairo. Explore Islamic Cairo, the Citadel, Khan el-Khalili bazaar, Coptic Cairo.
itinerary.notes: Taxi needed between Citadel and Coptic Cairo

itinerary.description: Final day. Fly CAI→ATH on Aegean A3935, 19:55–22:00. Arrive home.

schema.title: Itinerary
schema.description: Day-by-day trip itinerary with dates, flights, lodges, and contacts.

flights.description: Flight details array for this day
